member.name: T:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Catalog.HandleStyleDapperReader
member.summary: Dapper readers for the Step-7 accessory catalogs. Same pattern as the glass / color readers — list-by-parent for the public endpoints, load-all + load-compat for the AccessoryCatalog bag the pricing pipeline uses.

member.name: M:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Catalog.HandleStyleDapperReader.#ctor(BEQSAN.Application.Common.Abstractions.IDbConnectionFactory)
member.summary: Dapper readers for the Step-7 accessory catalogs. Same pattern as the glass / color readers — list-by-parent for the public endpoints, load-all + load-compat for the AccessoryCatalog bag the pricing pipeline uses.

member.name: M:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.DependencyInjection.InitializeDatabaseAsync(System.IServiceProvider,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Ensures the SQLite database file directory exists, applies migrations (or creates the schema from the model if none exist yet), and seeds idempotent reference data. Safe to call repeatedly.

member.name: T:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations.HandleStyleConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core configurations for the three Step-7 accessory catalog entities. Same JSON-into-TEXT pattern for LocalizedText as the earlier catalogs; enum stored as int for compactness; same slug-unique + active+sort_order index pair.

member.name: T:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Persistence.Seed.AccessoryCatalogSeeder
member.summary:
Seeds the Phase-1 accessory catalog (12 rows: 4 handle styles + 4 lock types + 4 blind types) and the three compatibility meshes. Idempotent — skips by slug for catalog rows, by composite pair for compat rows.
2026-05-19 baseline (ADR-0004 + docs/research/2026-pricing-baseline.md): handles benchmarked against Hoppe Atlanta retail (maniglieria.com €3.10 aluminum → €12.50 brass + Georgian import + workshop markup); locks against Roto/Maco multi-point catalog + Georgian smart-lock retailers; blinds against dio.ge / winsome.ge Tbilisi catalog. Canary-pinned rows (modern-aluminum handle, multi-point-3 lock, external-aluminum-electric blind, sill ₾8000/m) kept verbatim because they're already within ±10% of the Georgian market mid.

member.name: T:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Persistence.Seed.ColorOptionSeeder
member.summary:
Seeds the Phase-1 color catalog (14 rows) + the material-compatibility mesh. Idempotent — skips by slug for color rows and by (material, color) pair for compat rows. UUIDv5-style deterministic ids keep rebuilds stable.
Per ADR-0002 amendment 2026-05-18: surcharges are flat per order (Roman-locked), not per m². Phase-2 promotes the rates to a PricingRule entity. 2026-05-19 (ADR-0004) baseline confirmed the existing tetri values are congruent with the larsonshutter.com "premium RAL +10–15%" industry rule and gns.ge color-tier deltas (anthracite/black/wine = ₾75 flat, bronze = ₾90, wood laminates = ₾180, mahogany dark = ₾210, custom RAL palette = ₾250).

member.name: M:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Persistence.Seed.ColorOptionSeeder.CompatibleColorSlugs(System.String)
member.summary: Which color slugs each material allows. Wood laminates are exclusive to pvc-laminated; pvc-white sticks to neutrals; aluminum-high-thermal gets the full premium palette.

member.name: T:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Persistence.Seed.GlassTypeSeeder
member.summary:
Seeds the 7 glass packages + the material-compatibility mesh. Idempotent — skips inserts when a glass row with the matching slug or a compat row with the matching (material, glass) pair already exists.
Surcharges are tetri/m² over the material baseline. The 2026-05-19 baseline (ADR-0004 + docs/research/2026-pricing-baseline.md) sits within −11% to +0% of the Georgian glass-fabricator mid (glassline.ge / glassco.ge / Şişecam Trakya dealer), per-canary-pinned to keep ADR-0002 Step-5 / Step-6 / Step-7 / Step-8 canaries (₾1336.18 / ₾1424.68 / ₾2333.17 / ₾2592.77) intact. Pricing is Roman-locked at code level for Phase 1; Phase 2 promotes the surcharge rates to admin-editable rows in a PricingRule table.

member.name: M:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Persistence.Seed.GlassTypeSeeder.CompatibleGlassSlugs(System.String)
member.summary: Which glass slugs each material allows. Quadruple-Low-E is heavy and only offered with aluminum-thermal / -high-thermal profiles. PVC tops out at triple-Low-E for the laminated tier; white PVC stops at double since the thinner profile can't carry triple weight reliably.

member.name: T:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Persistence.Seed.MaterialSeeder
member.summary: Idempotent seed of the 13 initial materials across the 5 product types. Prices in tetri (₾×100) are the 2026-05-19 BEQSAN baseline ratified in ADR-0004 (see docs/adr/0004-pricing-baseline-2026.md + the research note docs/research/2026-pricing-baseline.md). The baseline is set 5–10% above the Georgian competitor mid (window.ge / gns.ge / alu.ge / fanjrebi.ge / exclusive-geo.ge) to reflect direct-workshop positioning, German hardware standard, and the 10-year warranty. Aluminum rows stayed at the canary-pinned values because they were already congruent with the market mid; PVC rows lifted ~13% to align with Rehau Synego entry-tier reality. Skips inserts when a row with the same (product_type_id, slug) exists.

member.name: T:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Persistence.Seed.ProductTypeSeeder
member.summary: Idempotent seed of the 5 initial product types. Runs after EnsureCreatedAsync / migrations on every startup. Two kinds of work: 1. Insert any rows missing by slug. 2. Backfill dimension constraint columns (Min/Max Width/Height) on rows whose values are zero — covers data created before the AddDimensionConstraints migration landed. Real photos replace the placeholder hero URLs once Roman provides them.

member.name: T:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Persistence.SqliteDapperTypeHandlers
member.summary: SQLite stores GUIDs and DateTimes as TEXT — Dapper's default mapping (System.Convert) refuses those casts. Register these handlers once at startup so column types match property types across every Dapper query.

member.name: T:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.AesGcmTokenCipher
member.summary: AES-GCM 256 token cipher. Key bytes come from configuration (Social:Encryption:Key) as base64 — generate with openssl rand -base64 32. IV is 12 bytes (GCM standard) and unique per encrypt; cipher is plaintext+16-byte tag concatenated. Reads write only the IV + concatenated body, no key id — rotation is a re-encrypt-everything event, which is acceptable for ~10s of rows.

member.name: T:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.KieAiAssistService
member.summary: AI assist via KIE.ai chat-completions endpoint (OpenAI-compatible), routed to Claude Sonnet 4.6 by default. Single HTTP call per request — no streaming, no tool-use yet (auto-reply tool wiring lives in Phase 3 of the social plan).

member.name: M:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.KieAiAssistService.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.SocialOptions},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.KieAiAssistService})
member.summary: AI assist via KIE.ai chat-completions endpoint (OpenAI-compatible), routed to Claude Sonnet 4.6 by default. Single HTTP call per request — no streaming, no tool-use yet (auto-reply tool wiring lives in Phase 3 of the social plan).

member.name: T:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.MetaGraphClient
member.summary: Authenticated Meta Graph operations: publish posts (FB single/photo + IG container/publish two-step), pull conversations + comments, send replies. Each call accepts the decrypted page-scoped token — the client itself is stateless and lives as a registered HttpClient instance.

member.name: M:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.MetaGraphClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.SocialOptions},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.MetaGraphClient})
member.summary: Authenticated Meta Graph operations: publish posts (FB single/photo + IG container/publish two-step), pull conversations + comments, send replies. Each call accepts the decrypted page-scoped token — the client itself is stateless and lives as a registered HttpClient instance.

member.name: T:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.MetaOAuthClient
member.summary: Meta Graph OAuth flow. Modeled on social.iva.ge/backend/src/lib/meta.ts but without the login-config-id branch — we use classic scope-based login until the BEQSAN Meta App is approved for Login-for-Business. See ADR-0003.

member.name: M:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.MetaOAuthClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.SocialOptions},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.MetaOAuthClient})
member.summary: Meta Graph OAuth flow. Modeled on social.iva.ge/backend/src/lib/meta.ts but without the login-config-id branch — we use classic scope-based login until the BEQSAN Meta App is approved for Login-for-Business. See ADR-0003.

member.name: P:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.SocialOptions.AdminToken
member.summary: Header value the admin SPA sends on /api/v1/admin/social/* and /api/v1/admin/* generally. Phase 0 — replaced by real JWT auth in Phase 2.

member.name: P:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.EncryptionOptions.Key
member.summary: Base64-encoded 32-byte AES-256 key.

member.name: P:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.AiOptions.BaseUrl
member.summary: KIE.ai endpoint base. The chat completions URL is `{BaseUrl}/v1/chat/completions` and is OpenAI-compatible. Override per environment.

member.name: P:BEQSAN.Infrastructure.Social.AiOptions.Model
member.summary: Claude model id routed via KIE. Default to Sonnet 4.6 — fast + cheap enough for caption drafts and reply suggestions. See [docs/adr/0003-social-module.md].
